_note: Strong local persistent config, based on the 2026-06-10..12 campaign benchmarks: Nemotron-generated contextual retrieval at index time, hybrid dense+sparse retrieval fused with RRF, Qwen3-Reranker-4B over the fused shortlist, and parent-4k extractive answer packing. Requires local OpenAI-compatible endpoints for Nemotron (:8085) during indexing/answer tests and Qwen3 rerank (:8086) during reranked queries. Validate and adjust against a held-out gold set per TUNING.md before trusting a change on a new corpus.

embedding._alt_dense: BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 (768d, higher quality, slower) — re-index if changed
embedding._alt_sparse: prithivida/Splade_PP_en_v1 (learned sparse; better recall, larger/slower than bm25)

chunker._note: size/overlap/min_words in WORDS. min_words merges tiny heading sections so a heading-dense doc does not explode into hundreds of one-line chunks. code_* apply when --kind code.

hybrid._note: Each arm (dense, sparse) fetches `prefetch` candidates; RRF fuses their rank lists. DBSF is the score-based alternative.

rerank._note: Qwen3-Reranker-4B served through a Jina-compatible /rerank endpoint (vLLM pooling runner in the benchmark). The qwen3 template is required; without it the model anti-ranks. Disable with --no-rerank when the service is down or latency matters.

answering._note: Testing-only answer generation on top of retrieval. Parent-4k + extractive was the best citation-sensitive answer pack on the Wave-7 caveat slice. Calls an OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint such as local TensorRT-LLM Nemotron, vLLM, or a cloud provider. This is not part of the default retrieval workflow.
answering.system_prompt: You are a retrieval-grounded QA test harness. Answer only from the provided context. Cite every factual sentence with bracketed source ids like [1]. Copy exact source identifiers, constants, numbers, file names, quoted strings, commands, and error text instead of paraphrasing them. If the context is insufficient, say what is missing instead of guessing.

contextual_llm._note: Anthropic-style contextual retrieval: generate 1-2 situating sentences per chunk with Docker-hosted Nemotron, prepend header+context to the embedding/sparse field, and keep raw_text for answer/citation payloads.
